BodyName: Committee on Cultural Affairs, Libraries and International Relations

Items.Title: Oversight – Commemorating Juneteenth and Honoring Burial Sites of Formerly Enslaved African Americans.
Items.ActionText: This Oversight was Hearing Held by Committee
Items.MatterName: Oversight – Commemorating Juneteenth and Honoring Burial Sites of Formerly Enslaved African Americans.

Items.Title: A Local Law to amend the New York city charter, in relation to the identification of formerly enslaved African American burial sites
Items.ActionText: This Introduction was Hearing Held by Committee
Items.MatterName: Identification of formerly enslaved African American burial sites.

Items.Title: Resolution celebrating the Feast of San Gennaro and the Ferragosto Festival annually in September to honor the contributions of Italian immigrants and Italian Americans to the cultural, political, and economic fabric of the City of New York
Items.ActionText: This Resolution was Hearing Held by Committee
Items.MatterName: Celebrating the Feast of San Gennaro and the Ferragosto Festival.

Items.Title: Resolution declaring April 28 as Willie Colón Day in the City of New York to honor the multi-talented trombone player, bandleader, composer, and producer, who was a New York City pioneer of Latin music and a beloved salsa legend
Items.ActionText: This Resolution was Hearing Held by Committee
Items.MatterName: Declaring April 28 as Willie Colón Day.

Items.Title: Resolution declaring June 28 as Maria Antonia Cay Day in the City of New York to honor her enduring role in supporting and celebrating the Puerto Rican community and in preserving and uplifting its rich cultural heritage and traditions
Items.ActionText: This Resolution was Hearing Held by Committee
Items.MatterName: Declaring June 28 as Maria Antonia Cay Day.

Items.Title: Resolution declaring January 5 as Kappa Alpha Psi Day in the City of New York to recognize the fraternity’s long-standing tradition of fostering brotherhood, academic achievement, leadership development, and community service
Items.ActionText: This Resolution was Hearing Held by Committee
Items.MatterName: Declaring January 5 as Kappa Alpha Psi Day.

Items.MinutesNote: Other Council Members Attending: Hanks, Joseph, Banks and Public Advocate Williams
